## Summary

Describe the user problem and the behavioral change.

## Validation

- [ ] Runtime regression suite passes.
- [ ] Repository validation passes.
- [ ] Behavior changes are recorded in `CHANGELOG.md`.

## Safety and privacy

- [ ] This change contains no credentials, tokens, cookies, signed URLs, private course files, student information, or real user workspaces.
- [ ] Examples and fixtures are synthetic.
- [ ] I considered authentication, authorization, rate limits, data retention, copyright, and academic-integrity implications.
